---
title: "practice2"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
super_sked <- get_super_sked()
library(dplyr)
dumb_df <- super_sked %>%
  mutate(diff = t1pts - t2pts) %>%
  group_by(Date) %>%
  summarise(mean_diff = mean(diff)) %>%
  select(Date, mean_diff)

print(dumb_df)
library(xts)
dumb_df$Date <- as.Date(dumb_df$Date)


my_xts_series <- xts(x = dumb_df$mean_diff, order.by = dumb_df$Date)
print(dumb_df)
# Print the object
print(my_xts_series)
diff_ts <- ts(diff_ts = mean_diff, start = )
?ts
```

```{r}
library(rvest)
url <- "https://haslametrics.com/ratings.xml?z=0.9422237946990226"
page <- read_html(url) 
print(page)
table <- page %>%
  html_element("tbody") %>%
  html_table()
print(table)
```
```{r}
library(rvest)
url <- "https://haslametrics.com/ratings.xml?z=0.8267831301598584"
page <- read_html(url)
print(page)
body <- page %>%
  html_element("tbody")
#content > script:nth-child(8)
#teamcast > tbody
print(body)
url <- "https://barttorvik.com/all_ncaa.json"

resp <- request(url) %>%
  req_perform() %>%
  resp_body_json(simplifyVector = TRUE)

df <- as_tibble(resp)
```
```{r}
# Load the httr package
library(chromote)
library(rvest)


now_seeding.json
now_inprob.json
library(httr)
set_config(config(ssl_verifypeer = FALSE))
options(RCurlOptions = list(ssl_verifypeer = FALSE))
options(rsconnect.check.certificate = FALSE)
WebScrape <- GET("https://haslametrics.com/ratings.xml?z=0.9422237946990226")
Data <- as.data.frame(do.call(rbind, lapply(content(WebScrape,"parsed"), as.vector)))
#https://barttorvik.com/careerstats.json
```

```{r}
library(xml2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

# The URL you found in the Network Tab
xml_url <- "https://haslametrics.com/ratings.xml?z=0.9422237946990226"

# 1. Read the XML data
xml_data <- read_xml(xml_url)

# 2. Extract the nodes (assuming each team is wrapped in a <team> or <row> tag)
# Use xml_children to see the structure if you aren't sure
nodes <- xml_find_all(xml_data, ".//team") # Replace 'team' with the actual tag name in the XML

# 3. Convert to a Data Frame
# This logic turns the XML tags into columns
ratings_df <- map_df(nodes, function(x) {
  as.list(xml_find_all(x, "./*") %>% { setNames(xml_text(.), xml_name(.)) })
})

head(ratings_df)
# Try the base URL first
xml_url <- "https://haslametrics.com/ratings.xml"
xml_data <- read_xml(xml_url)
```
```{r}
library(httr)
library(xml2)

xml_url <- "https://haslametrics.com/ratings.xml"

# 1. Manually set a browser-like User-Agent
response <- GET(xml_url, user_agent("Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebkit/537.36"))

# 2. Check if the request actually worked
if (status_code(response) == 200) {
  xml_data <- read_xml(content(response, "raw"))
  print("Success!")
} else {
  print(paste("Failed with status:", status_code(response)))
}
```

```{r}
library(chromote)
library(rvest)
library(dplyr)

# Start browser session
b <- ChromoteSession$new()
b$Page$navigate("https://haslametrics.com/ratings.php")
Sys.sleep(4)  # wait for JS to load

# Pull rendered HTML
html <- b$Runtime$evaluate("document.documentElement.outerHTML")$result$value
page <- read_html(html)
b$close()
#https://haslametrics.com/projections.csv
# Find the table (equivalent to your xpath)
table <- page %>%
  html_element(xpath = '/html/body/div/table/tbody/tr[5]/td/div[3]/div/div/table')

# Extract by class (equivalent to find_elements by class name)
scoreproj1 <- table %>%
  html_elements(".scoreproj1") %>%
  html_text(trim = TRUE)

scoreproj2 <- table %>%
  html_elements(".scoreproj2") %>%
  html_text(trim = TRUE)

# Build data frame
df <- data.frame(
  scoreproj1 = scoreproj1,
  scoreproj2 = scoreproj2
)

df
```
```{r}
library(curl)
library(xml2)

url <- "https://haslametrics.com/ratings.xml?z=0.8267831301598584"

# Disable decoding and download raw
h <- new_handle()
handle_setopt(h, http_content_decoding = FALSE)

tmp <- tempfile()
curl_download(url, tmp, handle = h)

raw_bytes <- readBin(tmp, "raw", file.info(tmp)$size)

# Check first few bytes (magic bytes tell us compression type)
print(raw_bytes[1:10])

# Parse XML (xml2 handles encoding automatically)
doc <- read_xml(content_raw)

# Explore structure
xml_name(doc)          # root node name
xml_children(doc)      # child nodes
xml_structure(doc) 
```

```{r}
check <- get_super_sked()
duke_check <- check %>%
  filter(team1 == "Duke") %>%
  select(t1wp, t1pts, t2pts)
print(duke_check)


time1 <- timeMachine_ratings(20251105)
time1_duke <- time1 %>%
  filter(team == "Duke")
print(time1_duke)

dat <- get_super_sked()

df <- dat %>%
  mutate(ptDiff = t1pts - t2pts)



```

```{r}
library(BAS)

df_clean <- df %>%
  drop_na(tempo)


bas_model <- bas.glm(
  t1wp ~ t1oe + t2oe + t1de + t2de + tpro + t1propt + t2propt + t1elite + t2elite + t1py + t2py,  
  data            = df_clean,
  family          = binomial(),
  betaprior       = hyper.g.n(),
  modelprior      = uniform(),
  method          = "MCMC",
  MCMC.iterations = 10000
)
summary(bas_model)

plot(bas_model)   


plot(bas_model, which = 4) 

models <- bas_model$which   
post_probs <- bas_model$postprobs
```

```{r}
# BMA
pred_bma <- fitted(bas_model, type = "response")
pred_class <- ifelse(pred_bma > 0.5, 1, 0)

# matrix
table(Predicted = pred_class, Actual = df_clean$t1wp)

# results
mean(pred_class == df_clean$t1wp)
library(pROC)

#AUC
roc_bma <- roc(df_clean$t1wp, pred_bma)
auc(roc_bma)
plot(roc_bma, main = "ROC Curve - BMA model")
```

```{r}
library(konenMCBB)
library(dplyr)

# Current season ratings for all teams
ratings <- torvik_team_ratings(year = 2025)

# Top 25 by T-Rank power rating (Barthag)
ratings |>
  slice_max(barthag, n = 25) |>
  select(rank, team, conf, adj_oe, adj_de, barthag, wab)
```
